name: medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 20–50 invoices/month, frequent coding errors cause delayed reimbursements. We identify coding errors and reimbursement opportunities instead of manual coding review.

features: error detection for common coding mistakes
